dataset_name: Molecular evolution of classic Hodgkin lymphoma WGS
notes: Best true HL WGS candidate: 17 paired tumor-normal cHL genomes with bulk tumor and flow-sorted HRS samples; EGA reports 53 samples and 9.1 TB.

priority: Includes Hodgkin lymphoma among broader B-cell lymphoma sequencing, but appears to emphasize exome/panel/single-cell modalities rather than true WGS.

dataset_name: Whole-genome sequencing of EBV in Japan
sequencing_type: EBV genome WGS by hybrid selection
notes: Open viral-genome sequencing only; includes EBV samples from HL, DLBCL, PTLD and other diseases. Useful EBV subtype/variant comparator, not human WGS or anellovirus screen.

dataset_name: EBV-DLBCL WGS and targeted amplicon sequencing
sample_count: 63 samples; 8 matched tumor-normal WGS patients plus 47 targeted cases
notes: Best disease-specific DLBCL WGS candidate for EBV-positive DLBCL; controlled EGA access.

dataset_name: ICGC MMML-Seq follicular and DLBCL WGS
notes: Large DLBCL/FL WGS resource; EBV status may be incomplete or absent, but good for public-WGS viral-subtype expansion after access.

dataset_name: Mutational and structural analysis of DLBCL WGS
sample_count: 40 tumor-normal DLBCL cases plus 13 cell lines
priority: Older true WGS DLBCL resource; raw sequencing available by dbGaP application according to publication.

dataset_name: HOVON84 shallow WGS and targeted sequencing
sequencing_type: shallow human WGS plus targeted sequencing
notes: Large DLBCL shallow-WGS cohort. Viral detection may be depth-limited but useful for subtype extension if access is approved.

dataset_name: DNA/RNAseq serial biopsies from 75 DLBCL patients
notes: Serial DLBCL biopsies; includes whole genome or exome depending on biopsy. Useful if metadata and WGS subset can be separated.

raw_file_format: controlled alignments plus open processed files
notes: Not WGS, but large DLBCL resource with hg38 alignment data; useful secondary source for EBV RNA/exome viral screen, not ideal for anellovirus WGS.
Not WGS and small, but immediately inspectable clinical/processed DLBCL comparator.
Immediately downloadable paired-end WES FASTQs (~119 GB). Not WGS, but useful for testing viral-screening code on open lymphoma FASTQs.

dataset_name: Metagenomic DNA viruses from PTLD tissues
notes: Directly relevant to EBV/anellovirus PTLD, but I could not verify a public raw-data accession; likely requires author contact.
Large future PTLD viral dataset, including Stanford site participation, but sequencing/data release not yet public in the protocol.

sequencing_type: low-coverage cfDNA WGS plus targeted NGS
notes: Useful PTLD cfDNA comparator; no public raw accession found in this pass.

dataset_name: Whole-genome sequencing of EBV in Japan
sequencing_type: EBV genome WGS by hybrid selection
notes: Open EBV genome sequencing includes PTLD samples; useful for EBV variant comparison, not host WGS or anellovirus detection.
